response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of C++ in recent roles, and their leadership experience is more in open-source and mentoring than in owning cloud compute platforms or technical strategy at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-language versatility with proven open-source contributions
Demonstrated mentoring and workshop leadership in testing and engineering practices
Extensive experience with distributed systems, CI/CD, and DevOps tooling
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (from 2014-2015), far below the 8-year minimum
No clear evidence of cloud compute platform architecture or ownership of large-scale infrastructure
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering teams as required
